creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit in branch main references this bug:

URL: https://cgit.FreeBSD.org/doc/commit/?id=6abd877aba908c3650882da93b57edc46031c450

commit 6abd877aba908c3650882da93b57edc46031c450
Author:     Graham Perrin <grahamperrin@gmail.com>
AuthorDate: 2022-03-01 13:32:21 +0000
Commit:     Danilo G. Baio <dbaio@FreeBSD.org>
CommitDate: 2022-04-15 19:09:47 +0000

    handbook: Remove reference to FreeBSD Mall's print copies.

    The available FreeBSD Handbook, 3rd Ed, Admin Guide (Vol 2) (ISBN
    1-57176-328-7) was "completely up to date for the latest FreeBSD 4.x and
    5.x versions.", versions that reached end of life years ago.

    PR:             262274
    Reviewed by:    dbaio
    Pull Request:   https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-doc/pull/57

 documentation/content/en/books/handbook/_index.adoc | 1 -
 1 file changed, 1 deletion(-)
